evidence: "I'm partial to the history of civil war period, so that certainly colors my viewpoint."
"there are a lot of screwy situations that don't make sense."
"the way the plot bounces around, I'm pretty sure those folks wake up in the morning & start implementing their dreams into the story."
"Delivery was another story. Sometimes we get to watch the blue 'loading, please wait' line for half the length of the show."
"the producers don't leave much to the imagination; not for young 'uns, I'm thinking."
"The expressions on the characters faces are to be watched."
"we weren't too pleased when it was cancelled."
"Good show, & the characters even influence personal style."

summary: The user enjoys historical and action-oriented dramas, often appreciating good acting and visual storytelling. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging content but with some frustrations regarding delivery and coherence.
